The '''Pyrshak system''', also known as the '''Manaan system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] that was home to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]].

{{System-stub}}
